tldr: Review stale high-value problems, add one missing flagship pattern, and avoid spending time on very recent comfort problems.
why_now: The profile shows broad activity, but old low-count classics still look fragile and are higher value than more easy volume.
primary_action: Redo Median of Two Sorted Arrays and LRU Cache.
secondary_action: Do one new sliding-window flagship problem like Minimum Window Substring.
stretch_action: Re-solve one recent hard with count = 1.

reasoning.summary: The highest-value work is old low-count review plus one important missing pattern.
reasoning.detailed: This recommendation prioritizes stale high-transfer problems first, because older low-count solves are the best proxy for fragile mastery. It also keeps one slot for gap filling so the plan does not become only review.

insights: Recent activity is healthy, so the issue is retention, not motivation.
Hard coverage is thinner than medium coverage.
